subcodes.first_line: The Divine Book hath been sent down from the horizon of the heaven of gracious providence; every possessor of hearing hath hearkened unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب الهی از افق سماء عنایت رحمانی نازل هر صاحب سمعی باصغاء ندا فائز شد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
